What we do

Custom building,
crafting & design.

Seasonal pricing on decks, concrete, buildings, paint, and more. Whatever you have in mind — call or text 502-542-4473 and we'll figure out the best way to make it happen.

Decks & Porches
Covered porches, open decks, and overhangs built with cedar and treated lumber. Seasonal pricing available.
Screened Rooms
Enclosed screened porches and outdoor living rooms — great for lake houses and year-round enjoyment.
Buildings & Barns
Post-frame pole barns, garages, and outbuildings with metal roofing. Seasonal pricing available.
Concrete
Driveways, patios, and flatwork. Stained and standard finishes. Seasonal pricing available.
Custom Woodwork
Live-edge countertops, pipe shelving, built-in bars, pergolas, and one-of-a-kind interior builds.
Windows & Trim
Window installation, interior trim work, and finish carpentry done with care and attention to detail.
Painting
Interior and exterior painting. Seasonal pricing available — a great time to freshen up your home.
Remodeling & Repairs
Kitchen, bathroom, and general home remodeling. No job too small — done right the first time.

About us

"In God We Trust" —
and we build it right.

We started Rust & Sawdust because we genuinely love the work — the kind that leaves someone's home better than we found it. Based out of Somerset, we serve the Lake Cumberland region and take on projects of all sizes, from a quick repair to a full custom build.

We keep our pricing fair and offer seasonal deals on decks, concrete, buildings, paint, and more. Every job gets our full attention, whether it's a screened porch for a lake house or a pole barn going up on a back property.

If you've got something in mind, give us a call or shoot us a text at 502-542-4473. We'll talk through it, come take a look, and get you an honest quote — no pressure, no obligation.
